visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a warehouse-style supermarket with high metal shelves filled with cardboard boxes. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white puffy blouse and a black pinafore dress, stands in front of a large stack of red noodle boxes. She gestures animatedly towards the boxes and then holds one up to the camera. Bright overhead supermarket lighting illuminates the scene. (2) A close-up shot of the noodle box packaging. A finger points to a photographic image of a tea egg and noodles on the front of the red box. The camera zooms in slightly on the text and graphics. (3) The woman is back in frame, holding the box and pointing to different details on the packaging. Shoppers with carts are blurred in the background. (4) A quick insert shot of a price tag on the shelf displaying the cost of the noodles. (5) The setting shifts to an indoor home environment. A different woman with her hair in twin tails with purple ribbons, wearing a teal sweater, sits at a table. She displays individual noodle packets, a sauce packet, and a vacuum-sealed egg. The background shows a living room with various plush toys and collectibles on shelves. (6) A bowl of steaming cooked noodles with minced meat and a whole tea egg is shown in a close-up overhead shot. (7) Both women are now together at the table, eating the noodles with chopsticks from small bowls. They smile, give thumbs-up gestures, and hold up a graphic overlay showing a high rating score. (8) The video concludes with the two women recommending the product, holding the noodle packages close to the camera while expressive text overlays appear on screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 五木竟然出. (2) [Variety]: 圖片跟實體一樣! 五木擔仔麵. [Subtitle]: 真正茶葉蛋的擔仔麵哦. (3) [Subtitle]: 這實體拍攝. [Variety]: 實體拍攝. (4) [Subtitle]: 329元一包是54塊. (5) [Subtitle]: 等一下煮出來看蛋有沒有一樣. (6) [Variety]: 蛋蛋蛋蛋蛋. [Subtitle]: 五木擔仔麵 329元. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (7) [Subtitle]: 麵體非常的厚. (8) [Subtitle]: 55塊 我覺得超划算. (9) [Variety]: 古早好滋味. [Subtitle]: 擔仔麵 五木擔仔麵 滿分10分. (10) [Variety]: 9.5分. [Subtitle]: 我給10分. (11) [Subtitle]: 非常Q彈Q彈. (12) [Variety]: 很大塊. [Subtitle]: 甚至比外面小吃店的還要看得到肉塊. (13) [Variety]: 古老胡椒香擔仔麵. [Subtitle]: 肚子餓必備.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, and at least 2 other shoppers visible in the background aisles of the warehouse store.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long straight dark hair and wears a white blouse under a black dress; the other has long hair tied with purple ribbons and wears a teal turtleneck sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high-stack metal racking and industrial lighting, and a domestic home interior with a table and shelves decorated with character plushies.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female speech begins immediately with a bright, fast-paced electronic pop BGM set at a moderate volume. The speaker's pitch is high and delivery is rapid, creating an enthusiastic tone. Faint echoes of a large indoor space are audible in the background. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition. The vocal continues, now describing the product's packaging details with high arousal. The BGM maintains a steady, driving beat. (3) The acoustic environment shifts to a cleaner indoor setting. Two female voices interact, speaking with high valence and excitement. Sound of plastic packaging rustling is clearly audible. (4) Distinct percussive 'slurping' and 'munching' sounds occur as the subjects eat. The vocals are punctuated by expressive exclamations of approval. (5) A concluding bell-like chime sound effect plays as the speakers give their final rating. The BGM swells briefly before fading out quickly at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> In-Store Discovery -> Product Unboxing -> Preparation and Tasting -> Rating and Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review and recommend the Wu-Mu brand Danzai Noodles available at Costco. It highlights the novelty of the product containing a real tea egg and assesses its taste, texture, and value for money through an enthusiastic and engaging presentation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing a specific product, highlighting its retail price at Costco, and providing a highly positive, numerical rating and strong recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This short-form video follows popular social media trends by using rapid-fire editing, high-energy narration, and colorful text overlays to keep the audience's attention during a product review.
